modules.name: 战场雷达 V1.2 (可拖动版)
modules.code: (function(){ if(document.getElementById('ghost-radar-handle'))document.getElementById('ghost-radar-handle').remove(); const handle=document.createElement('div'); handle.id='ghost-radar-handle'; handle.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:100px;left:5px;width:240px;height:24px;background:rgba(0,102,170,0.75);border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;z-index:999998;cursor:move;user-select:none;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-sizing:border-box;border-bottom:1px solid #00aaff;'; handle.innerHTML='⚡ 战场雷达 ≡ 拖动移动'; document.body.appendChild(handle); let isDragging=false; let dragOffsetX=0; let dragOffsetY=0; let hasMoved=false; function getCanvasScale(){ let c=document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c)return{x:1,y:1}; let r=c.getBoundingClientRect(); return{x:r.width/Laya.stage.width,y:r.height/Laya.stage.height} } function syncHudPos(){ if(!window._battleHudPanel)return; let hx=parseFloat(handle.style.left)||0; let hy=parseFloat(handle.style.top)||0; let s=getCanvasScale(); window._battleHudPanel.pos(hx/s.x,(hy+24)/s.y) } handle.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){ isDragging=true; hasMoved=false; dragOffsetX=e.clientX-handle.offsetLeft; dragOffsetY=e.clientY-handle.offsetTop; e.preventDefault() }); document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){ if(!isDragging)return; hasMoved=true; let newX=e.clientX-dragOffsetX; let newY=e.clientY-dragOffsetY; newX=Math.max(0,Math.min(newX,window.innerWidth-50)); newY=Math.max(0,Math.min(newY,window.innerHeight-30)); handle.style.left=newX+'px'; handle.style.top=newY+'px'; syncHudPos() }); document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){ isDragging=false }); (function(){ if(window._battleHudPanel){window._battleHudPanel.destroy();window._battleHudPanel=null} if(window._battleHudLoop){clearInterval(window._battleHudLoop);window._battleHudLoop=null} window._petRegenStates={}; console.log('\u{1F680} 终极战场雷达已部署 (可拖动版)...'); let hud=new Laya.Panel(); hud.size(240,600); hud.pos(5,124); hud.zOrder=99999; hud.vScrollBarSkin=''; hud.visible=false; let bg=new Laya.Sprite(); bg.graphics.drawRect(0,0,240,600,'#000000cc'); hud.addChild(bg); Laya.stage.addChild(hud); window._battleHudPanel=hud; function renderData(playerList,petList,titleStr,isBattle){ hud.removeChildren(); hud.addChild(bg); hud.visible=true; let title=new Laya.Label(titleStr); title.color='#00ff00'; title.fontSize=18; title.bold=true; title.pos(10,10); hud.addChild(title); let startY=40; playerList.forEach((player)=>{ if(player.state==='dead'&&!player.battlePet)return; let pBox=new Laya.Sprite(); pBox.graphics.drawRect(0,0,230,180,'#333333aa'); pBox.pos(5,startY); hud.addChild(pBox); let innerY=5; let pName=player.name||'未知玩家'; let props=player.props||{}; let pTitle=new Laya.Label('\u3010玩家\u3011'+pName); pTitle.color='#00ccff'; pTitle.fontSize=16; pTitle.bold=true; pTitle.pos(5,innerY); pBox.addChild(pTitle); innerY+=22; let maxHp=props.hp||0; let currentHp=isBattle?(player.hp!==undefined?Math.max(0,player.hp):maxHp):maxHp; let hpLoss=maxHp-currentHp; let pHpTxt=new Laya.Label('血量: '+currentHp+' / '+maxHp); pHpTxt.color=(currentHppt.owner&&pt.owner.id===player.id):null; let petInfo=myPet?myPet.info:player.battlePet; if(petInfo){ let info=petInfo.info||petInfo; let petTitle=new Laya.Label('\u3010宠物\u3011'+info.name+' (Lv.'+(info.level||0)+')'); petTitle.color='#ff66cc'; petTitle.fontSize=16; petTitle.bold=true; petTitle.pos(5,innerY); pBox.addChild(petTitle); innerY+=22; let petPropsTxt=new Laya.Label('生命:'+(info.showHpValue||0)+' 力量:'+(info.showPowerValue||0)); petPropsTxt.color='#ffff00'; petPropsTxt.fontSize=14; petPropsTxt.pos(5,innerY); pBox.addChild(petPropsTxt); innerY+=22; let maxMp=info.showMpValue||0; let consumedMp=myPet?Math.abs(myPet.mp||0):0; let currentMp=maxMp; let displayRegen=0; if(isBattle&&myPet){ let petId=info.petId||'unknown'; let pState=window._petRegenStates[petId]; if(!pState){window._petRegenStates[petId]={lastConsumedMp:consumedMp,regenAmount:0,isRegenerating:false};pState=window._petRegenStates[petId]} if(consumedMppState.lastConsumedMp)pState.isRegenerating=true; pState.lastConsumedMp=consumedMp; if(pState.isRegenerating)pState.regenAmount+=(maxMp*0.01); displayRegen=Math.floor(pState.regenAmount); currentMp=Math.floor(maxMp-consumedMp+displayRegen); if(currentMp>=maxMp){currentMp=maxMp;pState.regenAmount=consumedMp;displayRegen=consumedMp;pState.isRegenerating=false} } let mpTxt=new Laya.Label('法力: '+maxMp+' / '+currentMp); mpTxt.color='#00ffcc'; mpTxt.fontSize=18; mpTxt.bold=true; mpTxt.pos(5,innerY); pBox.addChild(mpTxt); innerY+=22; let mpDetailTxt=new Laya.Label('(消: '+consumedMp+' / 回: '+displayRegen+')'); mpDetailTxt.color='#cccccc'; mpDetailTxt.fontSize=12; mpDetailTxt.pos(5,innerY); pBox.addChild(mpDetailTxt) }else{ let noPet=new Laya.Label('未携带宠物'); noPet.color='#888888'; noPet.fontSize=14; noPet.pos(5,innerY); pBox.addChild(noPet) } startY+=190 }) } let lastPlayerCount=-1; let battleTickCounter=0; window._battleHudLoop=setInterval(()=>{ let gameScene=null; let roomScene=null; function findScene(node){ if(node){ if(node.roleList&&node.petList)gameScene=node; if(node.roomRoleService&&node.roomRoleService.roleList&&!node.petList)roomScene=node } if(node&&node._children)node._children.forEach(findScene) } findScene(Laya.stage); if(gameScene){ battleTickCounter++; if(battleTickCounter>=2){ renderData(gameScene.roleList,gameScene.petList,'====== 战斗情报 ======',true); battleTickCounter=0 } lastPlayerCount=-1 }else if(roomScene){ battleTickCounter=0; window._petRegenStates={}; let currentPlayers=roomScene.roomRoleService.roleList.filter(p=>p&&p.id); if(currentPlayers.length!==lastPlayerCount){ renderData(currentPlayers,null,'====== 房间情报 ======',false); lastPlayerCount=currentPlayers.length } }else{ if(hud.visible){hud.visible=false;lastPlayerCount=-1;window._petRegenStates={}} } },500) })(); })();
